description: Letter from the wife of Maʿānī. Desperate letter of appeal to the 'courts' (judges) from a blind woman whose husband had fled to Alexandria and left her and her 3 year old girl. She is pleading to the community for relief. She calls herself 'a widow during the lifetime (of her husband). (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, pp. 218, 472 and from Cohen)
tags: disability: poverty, communal, illness letter 969-1517, disability: women's, disability, disability: vision, Appeal, Illness
description_he: מכתב מאשת מעאני. קריאת ייאוש לבתי הדין מאישה עיוורת שבעלה ברח לאלכסנדריה והשאיר אותה ואת בתה בת 3. מכנה עצמה 'אלמנה בחיי בעלה'.
